title: Fix missing banner and wordmark SVGs in docs build

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Two issues found: (1) index.qmd references ../images/banner.svg which escapes the docs/ output dir -- GitHub Pages only deploys docs/ so the path 404s. A copy already exists at docs_src/assets/img/banner.svg. (2) forecast-wordmark.svg is only referenced via JS in _footer.html, not in .qmd files, so Quarto may not copy it during CI. Fix: change banner ref to assets/img/banner.svg and add explicit resources config to _quarto.yml.

comments.author: maxine--basel
comments.content: Fixed: (1) Changed banner ref in index.qmd from ../images/banner.svg to assets/img/banner.svg. (2) Added explicit resources list to _quarto.yml for banner.svg and forecast-wordmark.svg. (3) Updated generated docs/index.html and copied banner.svg to docs/assets/img/.
